stemHtml: ATC instructs an aircraft to perform a 360° turn to the right due to some slower traffic proceeding ahead. The correct sequence of the corresponding radio calls is…

options.a: F-AX, turn right complete turn. Turn right complete turn, F-AX
options.b: F-AX, turn thirty six zero right. Turn thirty six zero right, F-AX
options.c: F-AX, rotate to the right now. Rotate to the right now, F-AX
options.d: F-AX, make a three sixty turn right. Three sixty right, F-AX
